title: Vanilla-Ish
description: A lightweight, vanilla styled take on Minecraft in the not so far future
body:
A certain great time!

Yet another take on a vanilla styled modpack, Vanilla-Ish offers what seems to be the closest possible feel and atmosphere to vanilla Minecraft when it come to its mods. Take a dive in remastered oceans and caves, even ocean caves! Venture through a lush and remastered forest, not just pushed farther, but thrown farther! Explore vast mountains bigger than ever before, and take creativity and courage to the next level with Vanilla-Ish!
